parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor Admin
participant ":RemoveScooterUI" as UI
participant ":RemoveScooterScooterController" as Controller
participant "pharmServ\n:PharmacyService" as PharmServ
participant "pharmDB\n:PharmacyDB" as PharmDB
participant "scootServ\n:ScooterService" as ScootServ
participant "scootDB\n:ScooterDB" as ScootDB

activate Admin
Admin -> UI : 1 Sends a request regarding the update of an electric scooter's data
activate UI
UI -> Controller : 2 showPharmacies()
activate Controller
Controller -> PharmServ ** : 3 create()
activate PharmServ
PharmServ -> PharmDB ** : 4 create()
Controller -> PharmServ : 5 lstPharmacies = getPharmacies()
PharmServ -> PharmDB : 6 lstPharmacies = getPharmacies()
activate PharmDB
ref over PharmDB : SD_CONNECTIONS
PharmDB --> PharmServ
deactivate PharmDB
PharmServ --> Controller
deactivate PharmServ
Controller --> UI
deactivate Controller
UI --> Admin : 7 Shows the list of pharmacies and asks to choose one
Admin -> UI : 8 Chooses the pharmacy
UI -> Controller : 9 showScooterList(pharmacyId)
activate Controller
Controller -> ScootServ ** : 10 create()
activate ScootServ
ScootServ -> ScootDB ** : 11 create()
Controller -> ScootServ : 12 lstScooters = getScootersList(pharmacyId)
ScootServ -> ScootDB : 13 lstScooters = getScootersList(pharmacyId)
activate ScootDB
ref over ScootDB : SD_CONNECTIONS
ScootDB --> ScootServ
deactivate ScootDB
ScootServ --> Controller
deactivate ScootServ
Controller --> UI
deactivate Controller
UI --> Admin : 14 Shows the list of eletric scooters and asks to choose one
Admin -> UI : 15 Chooses the eletric scooter
UI --> Admin : 16 Shows the information about the scooter, asking to update
Admin -> UI : 17 Updates the information
UI -> Controller : 18 updateScooter(batteryPerc, chargingStatus,\npotency, weight, batteryCapacity, maxPayload, pharmacyId)
activate Controller
Controller -> ScootServ : 19 updateScooter(batteryPerc, chargingStatus,\npotency, weight, batteryCapacity, maxPayload, pharmacyId)
activate ScootServ
ScootServ -> ScootDB : 20 updateScooterFromDB(batteryPerc, chargingStatus,\npotency, weight, batteryCapacity, maxPayload, pharmacyId)
activate ScootDB
ref over ScootDB : SD_Connections
ScootDB --> ScootServ
deactivate ScootDB
ScootServ --> Controller
deactivate ScootServ
Controller --> UI
deactivate Controller
UI --> Admin : 21 Validates all the information, informing of the success of the operation
deactivate UI
deactivate Admin
@enduml
```
